message:
test(build): add partial data coverage tests for BuildCompletion

Add two unit tests to verify BuildCompletion handles partial data
correctly:
- test_build_completion_markdown_partial_data_no_coverage: success with
  no test counts or coverage
- test_build_completion_markdown_partial_tests_no_coverage: success with
  test counts but no coverage percentage

These tests satisfy the acceptance criteria for meta_skill-ser which
requires testing that partial data (no coverage) still works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
